markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss delivery quality issues and potential solutions for GrowthX's content production process.](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sales process needs adjustment: Clearer scoping and expectation-setting with clients before closing deals](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Delivery team faces challenges: Untrained staff, misaligned expectations, and inefficient workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Workflow improvements needed: Formalize process for iterating on and managing the content production system](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Human-side enhancements: Better training, onboarding, and performance management for content managers (CMs) and managing editors (MEs)](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

## Topics

### Sales Process Misalignment

  - [Current approach: Vague promises leading to misaligned client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Proposal: Implement more structured, transparent scoping before closing deals](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Example: Detailed statement of work (SOW) outlining deliverables, timelines, and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Consider different pricing/packaging for fixed-scope vs. open-scope projects](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Potential solution: Pre-close alignment session to review detailed project timeline with clients](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

### Delivery Team Challenges

  - [Organization is new (4-5 weeks old), lacking established processes and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Understaffing issues for complex, custom projects (e.g., StackBlitz, BAPI)](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Need for better skills assessment and training before assigning team members to projects](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Suggestion: Implement a "bootcamp" or training period before putting new hires on client work](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Workflow Improvement Process

  - [Current state: Ad-hoc requests to Daniel or Kirkland for changes](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Proposal: Formalize weekly or bi-weekly grooming sessions](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [Involve key stakeholders (directors, MEs, engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Review backlog, prioritize improvements, and align on roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Need for better visibility into ongoing workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [Suggestion: Create a high-level board or dashboard for tracking progress](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Consider implementing regular async updates on workflow changes](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

### Content Quality and Efficiency

  - [Issue raised: CMs spending significant time (avg. 30 min) editing AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Potential solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [Improve prompts to reduce common issues (e.g., removing unnecessary "future" sections)](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [Implement better tracking of time spent on content editing](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [Consider adding a copy-editing step for high-value clients (similar to Animals agency approach)](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule separate discussion with Marcel regarding sales process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Formalize workflow improvement process (grooming sessions, visibility tools)](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Develop and implement training/onboarding program for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Explore options for better tracking content production time and quality metrics](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Investigate potential copy-editing solutions for improving final content quality](https://fathom.video/share/AvsQThg4w9wi31jsHhYSamoXmPNzNqdW?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
